name: Gladiator Beast Bestiari
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ベストロウリィ
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: Target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Bestiari".
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: Target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Bestiari".
eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: Target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Bestiari".

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns itself from field to Deck for cost
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
